title: Fake Netherite
description: A small mod that adds Fake Netherite to the game
body:
Fake Netherite Mod

Fake Netherite Mod is a small mod that tends to add an item to the game known as Fake Netherite, which looks same as Netherite but is weak

This mod is currently only for Forge but later may update to Fabric

The mod may update to 1.17 after Forge 1.17 releases
